text: 3 UNIFIL PEACEKEEPERS KILLED — FIRST FATALITIES: Three Indonesian peacekeepers killed in two separate incidents in south Lebanon within 24 hours; France seeks emergency UNSC meeting; IDF says investigating; origin of both attacks unclear

IRGC COMMANDER KILLED + SAUDI INTERCEPTS: Brig. Gen. Hassanzadeh (Rasul-Allah Corps, Tehran security) killed in Israeli strike; Gen. Zakariaei dies of March 28 wounds; Saudi intercepts 10 drones + 8 ballistic missiles overnight; drone debris hits 6 houses in Al-Kharj

IRAN PARLIAMENT APPROVES HORMUZ TOLL PLAN: Rial-denominated tolls, bans US/Israeli vessels + ships from sanctioning nations; Ghalibaf warns of US plan to seize Iranian island; potential revenue $600-800M/month; Rubio: 'illegal, unacceptable, dangerous'

text: RUBIO: WAR 'WEEKS NOT MONTHS' + POPE CONDEMNS WAR: Rubio tells Al Jazeera Hormuz reopens 'one way or another'; confirms Iran backchannel via intermediaries; Pope Leo Palm Sunday: 'God rejects war — no one can use Him to justify war'; FDD publishes counter-argument citing Just War doctrine

GAS CROSSES $4.00 + KNESSET RECORD BUDGET: AAA national avg $4.02/gal — first time since Aug 2022, up $1.04 in one month; Knesset approves $45.8B defense budget (record); Brent $112.90/bbl (+41%); WTI $102.08; S&P 500 posts worst March since 2022 — $2.7T wiped

text: CHINA-PAKISTAN 5-POINT PEACE PLAN: Calls for immediate ceasefire, Hormuz restoration, UN framework; first formal peace plan from major power; Pezeshkian tells EU 'ready to stop fighting with guarantees'; Araghchi confirms US backchannel
